mapper.select: SELECT isu_cd FROM krx_daily_trade WHERE bas_dd = (SELECT MAX(bas_dd) FROM krx_daily_trade) ORDER BY CAST(REPLACE(acc_trdval, ',', '') AS UNSIGNED) DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT bas_dd AS basDd, isu_cd AS isuCd, isu_nm AS isuNm, mkt_nm AS mktNm, tdd_clsprc AS tddClsprc, acc_trdvol AS accTrdvol, acc_trdval AS accTrdval FROM krx_daily_trade WHERE isu_cd = #{symbol} ORDER BY bas_dd ASC
